title: Slime Mimic
body:
[![Fabric API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jptrzy/infusion-table-mod/1.17.1/Images/fabric-api-badge-lanczos.webp)](https://minecraft.curseforge.com/projects/fabric-api)

## About
Slime Mimic Mod adds to Minecraft mimic mob that could appear in loot chests. It has also the ability to mimic any full block.  

### Where can I find it?
You can find it in any chest with "random loot"; precisely it has 10% to spawn when player try to open any kind of that chest.

## Downloads:
* [Github](https://github.com/jptrzy/slime-mimic-mod/releases)
* [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/slime-mimic-mod/versions)
* [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/slime-mimic/files)

## Known Issues:
* For example when transforming to grass it has a problem rendering with grass layer of block.
* When transformed light is weird.
